zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Douce Ashton於1431年出生在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林時，她的父親John Thomas de Ashton28歲，母親Elizabeth de Byron34歲。她於大約1440年與Sir Thomas Gerard在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於從1460年1月10日到1461年1月9日在英國藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Douce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dowse
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English douce, dowce ‘sweet, pleasant’ (Old French dolz, dous, later doux), or from the Middle English personal name Douce (borrowed from Old French Douce, Latin Dulcia, derived from Latin dulcis) with the same meaning. The name was sometimes used as a woman's personal name and occasionally used for a man. The modern name is mostly pronounced to rhyme with house but sometimes with loose, as indicated by the variant Duce.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Douce Ashton was born in 1431, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, her father, John Thomas de Ashton, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth de Byron, was 34. She married Sir Thomas Gerard about 1440, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died from 10 January 1460 to 9 January 1461, in Lancashire, England.

ko.Ashton under Lyne, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Douce Ashton(이)가 1431년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Thomas de Ashton(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Byron(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 Sir Thomas Gerard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 1월 10일부터 1461년 1월 9일까지 영국 랭카실르에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Douce Ashton родилась в 1431 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Thomas de Ashton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Byron, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Gerard около 1440 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла с 10 января 1460 по 9 января 1461 в местности ланкашир, Англия.
